div1.entryFree:
Effectual, 1) operative, efficacious: the doom, which, unreversed, stands in e. force, Gentl. III, 1, 223. to teach you gamut in a briefer sort, more pleasant, pithy and e. Shr. III, 1, 66.
2) full of import, grave, decisive: or else conclude my words e. H6B III, 1, 41. a reason mighty, strong and e. Tit. V, 3, 43 (cf. Effect subst. 5).
